'''Shey Tapani''' was an [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] noble and the [[Gender/Legends|man]] who united the [[Expanse]]. In a twenty year civil war, Tapani, the lord of [[House Melantha]], waged a war against the other [[Tapani Noble Houses|Noble Houses]], which were then independent kingdoms. He finally triumphed over the [[Rogue Houses]] at the [[Battle of Shindra's Veil]], where he completely eliminated two rival houses and caused another to collapse on itself. No longer opposed, Tapani crowned himself [[Emperor (Tapani)|Emperor]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] and ruled for 16 generations.

Two successors of Shey Tapani were [[Gorgano IV]] and [[Leocald VII]].

By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[7328 BBY]], a [[Shey Tapani University/Legends|university]] on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]] was named after him.<ref name="LE">''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''</ref>
